query_normalized: predicting individual pain sensitivity from resting‑state eeg microstates neuroscience
rationale: The paper focuses on TMS‑EEG methodology, stimulation protocols, and EEG oscillatory analyses, without addressing pain sensitivity or EEG microstates; it does not measure any variable related to the user’s independent (pain sensitivity) or dependent (EEG microstates) constructs, so it falls outside the relevant domain.
